Main Event | All-American Bacon Cheesebu.description: Our classic burger patty topped with fresh lettuce, sliced tomato, crispy bacon, sliced red onions, pickles and your choice of cheese: American, Swiss, Provolone or Cheddar. Served with waffle fries. Substitute a plant-based patty +$3

Main Event | Aloha Island Poke.description: Sushi-grade tuna tossed in a sesame-infused Asian dressing atop a bed of warm sushi rice and topped with wakame salad, edamame, shredded carrots, cucumbers, avocado, pickled ginger, scallions, sesame seeds and a drizzle of spicy mayo

Main Event | Caesar Salad.description: Romaine hearts, shaved parmesan cheese, house-made croutons, dressed with a creamy Caesar dressing and topped with freshly cracked black pepper

Main Event | California Chicken Sandwich.description: A classic sandwich featuring grilled chicken breast, crispy bacon, leaf lettuce, sliced tomato, guacamole spread and a garlic aioli. Served with waffle fries.

Main Event | Croissant Turkey Club.description: Oven-roasted turkey, brie cheese spread, crispy bacon, leaf lettuce, sliced tomatoes, mayonnaise served on a house baked croissant. Served with waffle fries

Main Event | Rix Half-Time Burger*.description: Introducing the Rix Half Time Burger! A culinary masterpiece created by our chefs that changes monthly, offering a new experience every time you visit. Served with waffle fries.

Main Event | Rix Steak Sandwich.description: Shredded strip steak piled on a toasted asiago baguette and topped with provolone cheese, red onions, arugula, chimichurri and creamy horseradish sauce. Served with waffle fries.

Main Event | Rix Wedge.description: Crispy wedge of iceberg lettuce, crumbled blue cheese, bacon lardons, red onions and heirloom tomato, topped with blue cheese dressing and drizzled with a tangy balsamic glaze. Add Grilled Chicken +$6 | Add Grilled Shrimp +$8

Main Event | Soup du Jour & Grilled Chee.description: A cup of our Soup Du Jour served with Grilled Cheese Sandwich on Sourdough bread. Upgrade to a loaded grilled cheese stuffed with crispy bacon and grilled tomato for an additional $3

Signature Cocktails | Everything Hurts.description: Barbancourt 8-yr Rum, Orange & Pineapple Juice, Blackstrap Bitters, Coconut Cream, Nutmeg

Signature Cocktails | Passion Mai-Tai.description: Don Q White Rum & Plantation Dark Rum, Amaretto, Fresh Lime & Passion Fruit

Signature Cocktails | Purple Rein.description: SVEDKA Vodka, Blue Curacao, Pineapple & Cranberry Juice, Grenadine

Signature Cocktails | Top Shelf Margarit.description: Patron Blanco, Grand Marnier, Fresh Lime

Warmups | Downtown Mozz.description: Our hand-breaded mozzarella cheese sticks. Served with a side of spicy marinara sauce, dusted with parmesan cheese & garnished with fresh parsley.

Warmups | Loaded Nachos.description: Freshly-made corn tortilla chips topped shredded Monterey jack cheese, drizzled with queso sauce, queso fresco cheese, pico de gallo, scallions, guacamole, pickled jalapenos, and Mexican crema

Warmups | Rix Bone-In Wings.description: Tossed in your choice of our Signature Dry Rub, Carolina BBQ, Garlic Parm, Buffalo, Kickin Bourbon or Sweet Chili Sauce. Served with Celery and choice of Ranch or Blue Cheese
